Hurricanes

Hurricanes are dangerous and can cause major damage from storm surge, wind, and flooding.

Before a Hurricane

  • Know your evacuation zone and route.
  • Gather emergency supplies for several days.
  • Review your family communication plan.

During a Hurricane

  • Stay indoors and away from windows.
  • Listen to local officials for updates.

After a Hurricane

  • Return home only when authorities say it is safe.
  • Watch for downed power lines and flooding.

Related

  • Floods
